channel.title: Video on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Video on Arrans github.io

item.title: iv-org/invidious
item.description: Invidious is an alternative front-end to YouTube

item.title: ZoneMinder/zoneminder
item.description: ZoneMinder is a free, open source Closed-circuit television software application developed for Linux which supports IP, USB and Analog cameras.

item.title: NickeManarin/ScreenToGif
item.description: 🎬 ScreenToGif allows you to record a selected area of your screen, edit and save it as a gif or video.

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: Chocobozzz/PeerTube
item.description: ActivityPub-federated video streaming platform using P2P directly in your web browser

item.title: prateekmedia/pstube
item.description: Watch and download videos without ads

item.title: uTox/uTox
item.description: µTox the lightest and fluffiest Tox client

item.title: diraven/youtube-auto-watch-later
item.description: Automatically adds videos from your YouTube subscriptions to the watch later playlist.
